meta.title: Kiwi AI Lab — We analyze. Then we automate.
meta.description: An AI automation agency. We map your business, find where repetitive work leaks time and money, and wire it to automation you can measure.

hero.sub: We find where repetitive work drains your team — recurring tasks, messages, approval chains — and wire it to automation you can measure.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.body: We map how your operation actually runs — not the way an org chart says, but how it really is — and we find where work leaks: steps repeated by hand, follow-ups that slip, hours spent moving data between tools.

design.title: Design
design.body: We decide together what's worth automating, then design the solution step by step: which flow, which channel, which approval chain.

automate.title: Automate
automate.body: We wire the flow we designed into automation that runs 7/24 inside Crew OS.

report.title: Report
report.body: You see what each flow earns you, in numbers — the gain isn't assumed, it's measured.

sectors.label: Sector solutions
sectors.title: One real automation. The outcome it drives.
sectors.sub: Pick a sector. Every example below is a single automation we ship — not a feature list.
sectors.note: The gym software (Alpfit) is live today; the rest we build around how your business actually runs.

gyms.name: Gyms
gyms.automation: Winning back the member who's slipping away
gyms.body: When a member quietly begins to drift away, it gets noticed; a personal offer that fits their situation and a PT slot go out on WhatsApp — the win-back isn't left to chance, it's tracked one by one.

flow.trigger: A member hasn't checked in for 30 days
flow.action: A tailored offer and a PT slot go out on WhatsApp
flow.result: The return is tracked, not guessed

clinics.name: Clinics
clinics.body: Unconfirmed appointments get a two-step reminder, then auto-offer the slot to the waitlist if it stays open — the calendar fills itself.

flow.action: A two-step reminder fires, then the slot opens to the waitlist

ecommerce.name: E-commerce
ecommerce.body: A cart left for an hour triggers a conversation — not a coupon blast — that answers the real objection and routes payment links back in-thread.

flow.trigger: A cart sits untouched for an hour
flow.action: A conversation answers the real objection — no coupon blast
flow.result: The payment link routes back in the same thread

realestate.name: Real estate
realestate.body: Every portal inquiry is qualified, matched to live listings, and offered a viewing slot before a competitor calls back — the agent only sees ready buyers.

flow.action: It's qualified and matched to live listings
flow.result: A viewing slot is offered before a competitor calls

education.name: Education & consulting
education.body: Every form fill is qualified instantly, the right program info goes out on WhatsApp, and a consultation is booked — the follow-up runs itself until enrollment.

flow.action: The right program info goes out on WhatsApp
flow.result: A consultation is booked — follow-up runs itself

restaurants.name: Restaurants & cafés
restaurants.body: Reservations get automatic confirmation and reminders; if one cancels, the slot opens to the waitlist and regulars get a tailored offer — tables fill without anyone on the phone.

flow.action: Auto-confirm and reminder; a cancellation opens the slot to the waitlist
flow.result: Tables fill without anyone on the phone

crew.label: Crew OS
crew.title: Where your automations live and run.
crew.body: Every flow we ship runs inside one operating layer — observable, measurable, always on. You see what ran, what it saved, and what's next.

crewOs.title: Crew OS
crewOs.lead: The one place your automations live, run, and get measured. It connects your tools, turns repetitive work into flows, and puts the result in front of you as numbers.

connect.title: Connect
connect.body: We connect your tools, channels, and data into one layer — WhatsApp, SMS, email, CRM, calendar.

build.title: Build flows
build.body: We turn repetitive work into automation flows: trigger → steps → approval → outcome.

run.title: Run 7/24
run.body: Flows run on their own; watched, alerting you on errors, queuing the work.

measure.title: Measure & improve
measure.body: We see what each flow saved and keep improving the weak steps.

panel.title: Live operation
panel.metricsNote: An operations panel — every flow and what it saved, in one view.

meta.title: Alpfit Plus — Kulüp İşletme Yazılımı
meta.description: Kulübünüzün tüm işi tek platformda: randevu, grup dersleri, üyelik, ciro ve diyetisyen. Reformer, boks, CrossFit ve çok şubeli kulüpler için spor salonu yazılımı.

hero.sub: Randevu, grup dersleri, üyelik, ciro ve diyetisyen — hepsi bir arada. Üye ve antrenör telefondan, siz web panelinden.
hero.note: Reformer & pilates · boks & dövüş · CrossFit · çok şubeli kulüpler için.

problem.title: Kulüp dağınık araçlarla yönetiliyor.
problem.body: Randevu WhatsApp'ta, ciro Excel'de, ölçüm defterde, üye listesi başka yerde. Sonuç: kaçan randevu, ay sonu mutabakatı, görünmeyen boş kapasite ve risk altındaki üyeler. Her araç ayrı çalışıyor — ama hiçbiri birbiriyle konuşmuyor. Alpfit Plus tek doğru veri kaynağı olur.

roles.title: Herkes kendi ekranından.
roles.sub: Üye ve antrenör telefondan; yönetim ve diyetisyen web panelinden. Herkes yalnızca kendi işini görür.

app.title: Üye ve antrenör, cebinden yönetir.
app.sub: Üye randevusunu alır, gelişimini görür; antrenör gününü ve yoklamasını tek dokunuşla halleder. Aynı veriye siz web panelinden bakarsınız.

features.title: Kulübün tamamını yönetir — sadece takvim değil.

f1.d: Self-servis randevu, bekleme listesi, iptal / no-show adaleti, push hatırlatma.

f2.d: Tekrarlı program, kapasite, yoklama ve doluluk — reformer'dan WOD'a.

f3.d: Süreli üyelik ve seans paketi, kalan hak, bitişe yaklaşan üyeler.

f4.d: Üyelik, PT, ölçüm, ödeme ve diyetisyen — hepsi tek ekranda.

f5.d: Satış ↔ ödeme, borç takibi, nakit ciro; şube ve eğitmen bazlı kırılım, iade.

f6.d: Bütün şubeler tek ekranda; tıkla, şubenin detayına in.

f7.d: Kim kaç seans verdi, kim ne sattı — rakamla.

f8.d: Excel (XLSX/CSV) ve PDF çıktı; ay sonunu beklemeden.

f9.d: Hatırlatma ve duyurular; risk altındaki üyeyi önceden gör.

why.title: Rakip sadece takvim tutarken, biz kulübün tamamını yönetiriz.

lead.d: Danışan takibi, beslenme programı ve ölçüm okuma tek yerde. Diyetisyeninizle çalışıyorsanız, üye programını telefonundan görür — WhatsApp trafiği biter.

mobile.t: Hem üye hem antrenör için mobil uygulama
mobile.d: Antrenör kendi telefonundan takvimini yönetir, tek dokunuşla yoklama alır. Yerli rakiplerin çoğunda antrenör uygulaması yok.

multibranch.d: Şubeleri tek ekrandan yönetin. Büyüyen stüdyo zincirleri için ilk günden tasarlandı.

nohardware.d: Turnike, kart okuyucu ya da ekstra cihaza gerek yok. Bugün kur, bugün kullan.

singlesource.d: Randevu, üyelik, ciro ve ölçüm aynı yerde — çift kayıt ve ay sonu mutabakatı biter.

why.asideQ: “Geçen ay kaç randevuya gelinmedi, elinizde rakam var mı?”
why.asideSrc: Çoğu kulüpte bu rakam bilinmiyor. Alpfit Plus’ta ekranda duruyor — boş kapasite görünür olunca kampanyayı da oraya kurarsınız.

pricing.title: Salon başına, sade.
pricing.sub: Paket karmaşası yok, eğitmen limiti yok. Diyetisyen ve mobil uygulamalar dahil.
pricing.founderNote: Erken kurucu kulüplere özel koşullar sunuyoruz — detay için görüşelim.

roadmap.suffix: Bugün üründe değil; geliştirme yol haritamızda.

close.title: 15 dakikada kendi kulübünüzde görün.
close.body: Ekran paylaşımıyla gösterelim, kendi kulübünüzde nasıl duracağına siz karar verin.

forum.label: Bulletin
forum.title: Short reads on automation.
forum.sub: Lessons from real builds, tool comparisons and sector notes — a 3–8 minute read on average.
forum.note: A short read on automation now and then. No spam.

featured.title: AI SDR tools in 2026: a comparison with pricing
featured.excerpt: A human SDR runs $110,000+/year; AI SDR tools promise similar work 7/24 at a fraction of the cost. We rounded up the leading platforms, their pricing models, and realistic results.

featured2.title: Claude’s new models: Opus 4.8 and Fable 5
featured2.excerpt: Anthropic’s new Claude models — Opus 4.8 as the everyday flagship and Fable 5 for the hardest work — directly set what automation can reliably do. Which goes where, and what it means.

chat.label: Live demo
chat.title: Talk to a Kiwi assistant.
chat.sub: Real, streaming, multilingual — ask in Turkish, English, Arabic, German, or Spanish. It knows what we do and can route you to a call.
chat.greeting: Hi — I'm Kiwi's assistant. Tell me what your team does by hand most often, and I'll show you where automation fits.
chat.error: The assistant can't respond right now. Please try again shortly, or email us at kivanc@kiwiailab.com.

suggestions.one: How would you automate a gym?

founder.title: 1:1 with the founder
founder.body: You work directly with the person who builds it. No account-manager relay.

always.title: 7/24 assistants
always.body: Your automations don't clock out. They run, watch, and escalate around the clock.

measured.title: Measured, not promised
measured.body: Every engagement ships with the numbers attached. You'll know exactly what it moved.
